description: A close-up, partial view of the side of a white car. The image focuses on the rear passenger door and wheel area. The car's white paint shows reflections, some appearing smudged or scratched. A black plastic trim piece runs along the lower part of the car, encompassing the wheel arch. The car is parked on a surface covered with small light-colored gravel or sand. The rear wheel has a silver multi-spoke rim with a black tire.
location_context: An outdoor area with a gravel or sandy surface where a car is parked.
time_context: Daytime, indicated by clear lighting and reflections on the car's surface.
